content:
# Overall Project Summary: May 25, 2026

Development on May 25 focused on stabilizing the cloud API and refining CI/CD release workflows to ensure cross-platform reliability. Key achievements include resolving critical API crashes and advancing the implementation of a cross-platform OTA pipeline, while ongoing efforts remain centered on orchestrator startup stability.

## ✅ Completed Work

**API Stability & Performance**
*   Resolved a critical 500 error in the cloud-api package that caused crashes when `tool_choice: "required"` was utilized ([elizaos/eliza#7992](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7992)).

**CI/CD Pipeline Improvements**
*   Addressed release orchestrator startup failures by modifying reusable workflows to make secrets optional, preventing crashes during cross-platform releases ([elizaos/eliza#7837](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7837)).

**Safety & Policy**
*   Closed the discussion on personal-crisis safety scaffolds, establishing that per-agent character configuration is the preferred framework approach ([elizaos/eliza#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

**New Pull Requests**
*   **elizaos/eliza:** [#7990](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7990), [#7988](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7988), [#7987](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7987), [#7986](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7986), [#7985](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7985), [#7984](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7984), [#7983](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7983), [#7982](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7982), [#7981](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7981), [#7980](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7980), [#7979](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7979), [#7978](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7978), [#7977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7977), [#7976](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7976), [#7975](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7975), [#7973](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7973), [#7972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7972), [#7971](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7971), [#7969](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7969), [#7968](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7968), [#7966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7966), [#7965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7965), [#7958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7958), [#7957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7957), [#7956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7956), [#7955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7955), [#7954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7954), [#7953](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7953), [#7952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7952), [#7951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7951), [#7950](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7950), [#7949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7949), [#7948](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7948), [#7947](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7947), [#7946](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7946).

**Active Discussions**
*   **Release Credentials:** Ongoing development of a cross-platform OTA pipeline, including administrative playbooks for apt-repo publishing and expansion to Android, Apple, and Homebrew ([elizaos/eliza#7770](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7770)).

## 🐞 Issue Triage

**New Issues (elizaos/eliza)**
*   Orchestration & Logic: [#7967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7967), [#7964](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7964), [#7962](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7962), [#7963](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7963), [#7960](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7960), [#7959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7959), [#7961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7961), [#7970](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7970).
*   Compliance & Environment: [#7974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7974), [#7991](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7991).

**Closed Issues (elizaos/eliza)**
*   Safety & Policy: [#7925](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7925).
